title: Forbidden Axe 3D [Enigmatic Legacy]
description: This resourcepack replaces the usual, ugly 2D model of the forbidden axe, with its 3d version
body:
## 📜 Short description


**This resourcepack replaces the ugly 2D texture forbidden axe from Enigmatic Legacy with a 3D version**
